test.summary: All tests passed with race detection enabled

lint.summary: 106 pre-existing issues: 88 dupl (code duplication patterns), 18 staticcheck (style suggestions). These are existing codebase patterns, not introduced by bug fixes.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Magic number 30*time.Second should use constants.LongTimeout instead of hardcoding. The constants package already defines LongTimeout = 30 * time.Second for this purpose.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit documentation about initialization dependency ordering: when component A depends on component B, B must be initialized before A. The i18n-cache fix demonstrates this pattern clearly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-i18n-cache-nil: cache must be initialized before i18n because i18n checks cache.Manager != nil at manager.go:47

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that background services (like activity monitor) should be started after InitialChecks() completes to ensure database is ready.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-activity-monitor-ordering: activityMonitor.Start() correctly called after InitialChecks(b) at main.go:254

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand VAL-LOW-005 guidance to apply broadly to all timeout values across the codebase, not just main.go. The constants package already defines appropriate timeout constants.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-webhook-goroutine-leak uses 30*time.Second directly while constants.LongTimeout = 30 * time.Second exists

rejectedObservations.observation: The bugfix-worker skill doesn't exist in the repository
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented - This is noted in the review but doesn't affect validation outcome

notes: All 7 features in main-fixes milestone passed review
All features correctly address their validation contract assertions (VAL-HIGH-002, VAL-HIGH-003, VAL-HIGH-004, VAL-HIGH-012, VAL-MED-005, VAL-MED-006, VAL-LOW-002)
Tests pass with race detection enabled
Lint issues are pre-existing code patterns (duplication in DB helper functions, style suggestions) not introduced by these fixes
